name: dbgap_phs003428_fahad_fields_only.json
why_it_exists: Every access pack / SL map / gap-lineage report is a durable operational asset — must be addressable.

fields.label: Institutional mailing address
fields.where_to_insert: Address block under PI/Applicant section in dbgap_phs003428_ctep_email_final.md
fields.placeholder: [FAHAD_INSERT: full registered mailing address of CrisPRO/Brenus Pharma]
fields.how_to_find: Use the registered business address of CrisPRO/Brenus Pharma as filed with the state/country of incorporation or as listed on official company documents

fields.label: eRA Commons username
fields.where_to_insert: PI eRA Commons ID field in dbgap_phs003428_ctep_email_final.md
fields.how_to_find: Log in to https://public.era.nih.gov/commonsplus — your username appears in the top-right corner of the dashboard

fields.label: Institutional email
fields.where_to_insert: PI contact email field in dbgap_phs003428_ctep_email_final.md
fields.placeholder: [FAHAD_INSERT: your institutional email address at CrisPRO/Brenus Pharma]
fields.how_to_find: Use your official @crispro.com or @brenus-pharma.com email address (whichever is your primary institutional address)

fields.label: Institutional phone
fields.where_to_insert: PI contact phone field in dbgap_phs003428_ctep_email_final.md
fields.placeholder: [FAHAD_INSERT: your direct institutional phone number at CrisPRO/Brenus Pharma]
fields.how_to_find: Use your direct office or mobile number registered under CrisPRO/Brenus Pharma; include country code if outside the US (e.g., +1-XXX-XXX-XXXX)

fields.label: Date
fields.where_to_insert: Date line at the top of dbgap_phs003428_ctep_email_final.md
fields.placeholder: [FAHAD_INSERT: today's date in Month DD, YYYY format]
fields.how_to_find: Use today's date at the moment you send the email, formatted as e.g. July 14, 2025
